title: Anacheilium punctiferum
taxonomy: Anacheilium punctiferum is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The genus Anacheilium is a subgenus of the genus Dracula. Anacheilium punctiferum is often classified within the subgenus Anacheilium, which is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. This orchid species is known for its distinctive appearance and is highly prized by orchid enthusiasts.
